title: CleanUpState
text: CleanUpState Remove all state information from USTATE, prior to a specified date. "USYSSTAT".CleanUpState ( TimeStamp ) Table 1. Parameters Parameter Type Direction Value TimeStamp string IN DateTime value. If 0 or and empty string ( "" ), all occurrences will be removed. Description Use this operation for bulk cleanup actions on the USTATE table The following operation deletes all state records that are more than 24 hours old. Explain this code operation cleanState variables datetime vDate endvariables vDate = $datim - 24h ; current date and time minus 24 hours activate "USYSSTAT".CleanUpState(vDate) end Copy Was this topic helpful?
